title: Better Foliage Recreation
description: Better Foliage mod but recreated on a resourcepack!
body:
# **Better Foliage Recreation🍃**
![Better Foliage Recreation Market Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b8a7e0a9fc9ac3c2cb168d74c199c3a0a30a008_0.webp)

![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF&logoSize=auto&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FdJPfAQrapn)
![Join our Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/GITHUB-%23181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=FFFFFF&logoSize=auto&link=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FRecreationTeam%2FBetter-Foliage-Recreation)

# **What improves⛺**
**BFR improves Minecraft's foliage, changing the environment and bringing more life!**
# **Which mods conflict🚧**
**BFR changes block models and may conflict with other mods and/or textures that change them, so far they have been registered:**
## **Textures:**
- **[Better Fast Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass/versions)**
- **[Better Grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-grass-optifine)**

## **Mods:**
- **[BetterGrassify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify)**
# **Where can I ask for help❔**
**You can ask for help on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/mbsss2Zu8k)**
